parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his contradictory claims; he first claimed to be the Tanner [107] and later changed his story to being a 'lonely nobody' [132]. Justin also claimed to be the Tanner early on [31], and since there is only one Tanner card, James's claim was likely a lie to divert suspicion or create confusion. Both Mitchell (claiming to be the Seer) and Justin eventually pointed to James as the Werewolf, making him the most probable target for Team Village.
